title: Docs Viewer Roadmap
content_html:
Docs Viewer Roadmap

suggested order feature status depends on outcome
1 External Asset Collections ready — inventory user-owned local project files without turning them into documents
2 Control Surfaces ready — give controls a consistent definition, host, state, and action model
3 Local Tree Move Projection ready — update the local index after a committed move without a full refresh
4 Index Multiple Selection proposed Control Surfaces; Local Tree Move Projection add explicit checkbox selection and group movement
5 Document Visualisations proposed — support build-rendered D2 diagrams in authored documentation
6 Semantic Reference Authoring proposed — improve semantic-reference authoring when a bounded need becomes important
7 Recently Edited proposed — make update timestamps trustworthy and show the documents touched most recently
